Interface IZlibCompression

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.esriSystem
Assembly
ESRI.Server.System.dll

Provides access to compress and uncompress texture data.

[Guid("FEE4D81C-25D9-4389-A20C-16821EC90719")]
[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
public interface IZlibCompression

Properties

BufferSize[int]

Estimated buffer size of compress/uncompress texture data.

int BufferSize[int Size] { get; }

Parameters

Size int

Property Value

int

Examples

Sample Snippet

Methods

Compress(int, ref byte, ref int, ref byte)

Compress the current the input buffer. Uses best compression.

void Compress(int inSize, ref byte pInBuff, ref int pOutSize, ref byte pOutBuff)

Parameters

inSize int
pInBuff byte
pOutSize int
pOutBuff byte

Examples

Sample Snippet

CompressByLevel(int, ref byte, int, ref int, ref byte)

Compress the current the input buffer by level. If level less than 0, use default, if greater than best use best.

void CompressByLevel(int inSize, ref byte pInBuff, int level, ref int pOutSize, ref byte pOutBuff)

Parameters

inSize int
pInBuff byte
level int
pOutSize int
pOutBuff byte

Examples

Sample Snippet

UnCompress(int, ref byte, ref int, ref byte)

UnCompress the current the input buffer.

void UnCompress(int inSize, ref byte pInBuff, ref int pOutSize, ref byte pOutBuff)

Parameters

inSize int
pInBuff byte
pOutSize int
pOutBuff byte
